gamelift.fleet.locationcapacity.DesiredE.Docs: The number of Amazon EC2 instances you want to maintain in the specified fleet location. This value must fall between the minimum and maximum size limits.

gamelift.fleet.locationcapacity.MaxSize.Docs: The maximum number of instances that are allowed in the specified fleet location. If this parameter is not set, the default is 1.

gamelift.fleet.locationcapacity.MinSize.Docs: The minimum number of instances that are allowed in the specified fleet location. If this parameter is not set, the default is 0.
